summary: Completed testing of Scheduled Maintenance Mode and Team Leave button fix. All 19 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified for both Admin Maintenance panel and Team Bidding page. The critical 'Leave Clan/Team' button fix has been verified - the frontend now correctly calls /api/teams/leave instead of the old /api/team-bidding/leave endpoint.

maintenance_schedule_tests.GET /api/maintenance/status: PASS - Returns maintenance status including scheduled field
maintenance_schedule_tests.POST /api/maintenance/schedule: PASS - Admin can schedule maintenance with start_time and end_time
maintenance_schedule_tests.DELETE /api/maintenance/schedule: PASS - Admin can cancel scheduled maintenance

team_tests.GET /api/teams/my-team: PASS - Returns user's team or has_team: false
team_tests.POST /api/teams/leave: PASS - CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED - User can leave team
team_tests.Complete flow test: PASS - Create -> View -> Leave works correctly

details: 'So funktioniert es' section shows proper German content
'Sofort aktivieren' section with message and duration fields
'Wartung planen' section with date/time inputs (2 date, 2 time)

critical_fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend was calling /api/team-bidding/* endpoints but backend router was at /api/teams/*
critical_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed all fetch calls in TeamBiddingPage.js to use /api/teams/ prefix
critical_fix_verification.verification: Backend API test POST /api/teams/leave returns 200 with success: true

endpoints: POST /api/maintenance/schedule - Schedule maintenance with start_time, end_time, message
ui_elements: Wartung planen section in Admin Panel
Start date/time and End date/time inputs

critical_code_review_comments: TeamBiddingPage.js correctly uses /api/teams/ prefix for all API calls
maintenance.py has proper validation for schedule times (end > start, start not in past)
teams.py handles leader leaving correctly (transfers leadership or disbands team)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test teams created during testing are automatically cleaned up (disbanded when single member leaves)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduled Maintenance and Team Leave features are fully implemented and tested. All 19 backend tests pass. The critical fix for the Leave button was the API path change from /api/team-bidding/* to /api/teams/*. Admin Maintenance UI has both 'Sofort aktivieren' and 'Wartung planen' sections working correctly.
